content: write an email to my manager saying I will be late

Here's a simple email:

Subject: Running Late to Work

Dear [Manager's Name],

I wanted to let you know that I will be late to work today. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will make every effort to catch up on any missed work as soon as I arrive.

I expect to be in the office by [estimated arrival time]. If there are any pressing matters that I need to attend to as soon as possible, please let me know.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Would you like me to refine this email in any way?
